# DEALIX — Intelligent Deals. Real Growth.

> منصة ذكاء الأعمال المدعومة بالذكاء الاصطناعي للنمو التجاري الحقيقي  
> AI-powered Revenue Intelligence for real business growth in Saudi Arabia and the region.

---

## What We Build

DEALIX automates the full commercial activation cycle — from raw data to signed deals — across five productized services:

| Tier | Offer | Outcome |
|------|-------|---------|
| 0 | Free Diagnostic | Data quality score + gap map |
| 1 | 499 SAR Sprint | 7-day Revenue Intelligence Sprint |
| 2 | 1,500 SAR Data Pack | Clean, enriched account data |
| 3 | 2,999–4,999 SAR/mo | Managed Revenue Ops |
| 4 | 5K–25K SAR Custom | Full AI integration |

---

## Core Principles

- **Evidence-first:** every claim in our platform links to a proof ledger record
- **Approval-gated:** no automated external send without founder approval
- **Bilingual:** Arabic-primary (RTL), English-secondary
- **Saudi-executive tone:** calm, precise, data-driven — no hype

---

## Technical Stack

```
Python · FastAPI · Next.js · TypeScript · PostgreSQL · Redis
Tailwind CSS · Radix UI · Railway · Docker
```
